title: Gethsemane — The Cup
objective: Enter the garden with Jesus and see the full weight of what He is about to bear for the sin of the world.

sections.text: And he said, 'Abba, Father, all things are possible for you. Remove this cup from me. Yet not what I will, but what you will.'

title: The Trials of Jesus
objective: See Jesus stand before Pilate and Herod and understand how His condemnation is the justice that sets us free.

sections.text: Then Pilate said to him, 'So you are a king?' Jesus answered, 'You say that I am a king. For this purpose I was born and for this purpose I have come into the world — to bear witness to the truth.'

title: The Crucifixion
objective: Stand at the foot of the cross and see what the love of God looks like when it meets the full weight of sin.

sections.text: But God shows his love for us in that while we were still sinners, Christ died for us.

title: It Is Finished
objective: Hear Christ's final words from the cross and understand the completed, sufficient, once-for-all atonement He accomplished.

sections.text: When Jesus had received the sour wine, he said, 'It is finished,' and he bowed his head and gave up his spirit.

title: The Resurrection
objective: Encounter the empty tomb and the risen Christ — the event that changes everything for every believer for all time.

sections.text: But in fact Christ has been raised from the dead, the firstfruits of those who have fallen asleep.

title: The Great Commission
objective: Receive Christ's command to make disciples of all nations and understand the authority behind it.

sections.text: Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit, teaching them to observe all that I have commanded you. And behold, I am with you always, to the end of the age.

title: The Ascension
objective: See Jesus take His place at the right hand of the Father as the risen and reigning King of the universe.

sections.text: Men of Galilee, why do you stand looking into heaven? This Jesus, who was taken up from you into heaven, will come in the same way as you saw him go into heaven.

title: Pentecost — The Spirit Poured Out
objective: Witness the birth of the Church as the Holy Spirit falls on the disciples and the mission of God goes global.

sections.text: And they were all filled with the Holy Spirit and began to speak in other tongues as the Spirit gave them utterance.
